Artifacts, treasures, weapons and wonders of the Willverse. Seeded from the books; grows with community edits.

; Artifacts by series
* [[:Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts|Artifacts of Traveler's Gate]]
* [[:Category:Elder Empire artifacts|Artifacts of Elder Empire]]
* [[:Category:Cradle artifacts|Artifacts of Cradle]]
* [[:Category:The Last Horizon artifacts|Artifacts of The Last Horizon]]

[[Category:Objects and Materials]]
